name: University of Liechtenstein
tuitionNote: BSc: CHF 1,700 (~€1,700)/yr | MSc: CHF 2,400 (~€2,400)/yr; same fees for all nationalities; architecture, business, IT focus; Liechtenstein's only university
bachelorRequirements: Matura/Abitur or equiv (12–13yr) + entrance interview | IELTS 6.0 for English programs
masterRequirements: BSc (180 ECTS) + IELTS 6.5 for English-taught MSc; some programs in German

name: Private University in the Principality of Liechtenstein (UFL)
tuitionNote: MSc/PhD: CHF 12,000–18,000 (~€12,000–€18,000)/yr; medical science, law; German-taught; graduate-only
masterRequirements: MD/BSc/State Exam + German proficiency (C1) + professional experience for some programs

name: Liechtenstein Institute (research)
tuitionNote: Research institute; PhD supervision in political science, history, economics; affiliated with Swiss universities; no formal tuition
masterRequirements: N/A — PhD by research: MSc + research proposal + German proficiency
